partial_progress.details: All 6 phases completed. Naming conventions improved across Metalogic/

completion_data.completion_summary: Renamed GContent/HContent to snake_case, migrated bmcs_*, set_mcs_*, and mcs_* prefixed functions to proper Lean namespaces (BFMCS and SetMaximalConsistent). Enables dot notation throughout Metalogic/. Build passes with 975 jobs.
